'''Jortan''' was the [[Katarn Commandos]]'s medical specialist under the leadership of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. He carried a specialized [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]].
